basic_details.job_title: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has published the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. ADVT/TISS/SHS/AP/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Assistant Professor positions. Candidates holding a Master's degree with 55% marks in the relevant discipline along with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. degree are eligible to apply online for these vacancies. The application process will remain open until 19 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in relevant discipline and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. degree. Foreign university Ph.D. from top 500 ranked universities is also accepted.
qualification.details: Master's degree with 55% marks in economics and related disciplines. Cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar test accredited by UGC, like SLET/SET, OR awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Ph.D. obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU). | Desirable Experience: Ph.D. in subjects related to economics, preferably with focus on financial economics, public policy or governance. Proven track record of research and teaching in quantitative methods. Ability to teach courses related to different fields of economics. Familiarity with regulatory policies, economic regulation, public/infrastructure economics, urban policies, natural resource economics, and institutional economics. Ability to work in an interdisciplinary team. | Master's degree with 55% marks in Environment, Climate, and Sustainability Studies and related disciplines. Cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar test accredited by UGC, like SLET/SET, OR awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Ph.D. obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU). | Desirable Experience: PhD degree in interdisciplinary subjects such as Climate studies, Policy studies, Environmental studies, Energy studies, Development studies and related fields. Excellent academic and publication record. Orientation to social sciences. Ability to teach theory and field-based courses. Experience in research and project opportunities in interdisciplinary themes related to environment, climate change, and sustainability. Ability to teach 2-3 courses per semester, support fieldwork, and supervise master's dissertation. Strong orientation to delivering quality content in climate science/climate modelling, projections/climate extremes/vulnerability and impact assessment/Energy and climate change/Climate policy mitigation/global environmental governance.

salary_details.details: Entry pay of Rs. 57700/- in the Academic Pay level 10 as per 7th CPC.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss: Master's degree with 55% marks in relevant discipline and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. degree. Foreign university Ph.D. from top 500 ranked universities is also accepted.

content_sections.heading: TISS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TISS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TISS Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Assistant Professor (Economics- Regulatory and Financial Economics)
Assistant Professor (Environment, Climate and Sustainability Studies)

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree with 55% marks in economics and related disciplines. Cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar test accredited by UGC, like SLET/SET, OR awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Ph.D. obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU). Desirable Experience: Ph.D. in subjects related to economics, preferably with focus on financial economics, public policy or governance. Proven track record of research and teaching in quantitative methods. Ability to teach courses related to different fields of economics. Familiarity with regulatory policies, economic regulation, public/infrastructure economics, urban policies, natural resource economics, and institutional economics. Ability to work in an interdisciplinary team. Master's degree with 55% marks in Environment, Climate, and Sustainability Studies and related disciplines. Cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar test accredited by UGC, like SLET/SET, OR awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Ph.D. obtained from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU). Desirable Experience: PhD degree in interdisciplinary subjects such as Climate studies, Policy studies, Environmental studies, Energy studies, Development studies and related fields. Excellent academic and publication record. Orientation to social sciences. Ability to teach theory and field-based courses. Experience in research and project opportunities in interdisciplinary themes related to environment, climate change, and sustainability. Ability to teach 2-3 courses per semester, support fieldwork, and supervise master's dissertation. Strong orientation to delivering quality content in climate science/climate modelling, projections/climate extremes/vulnerability and impact assessment/Energy and climate change/Climate policy mitigation/global environmental governance.

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Entry pay of Rs. 57700/- in the Academic Pay level 10 as per 7th CPC.

rows.event: Last date of receipt of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the TISS Assistant Professor positions is 19th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor at TISS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Assistant Professor posts at TISS, with one each in Economics and Environment, Climate and Sustainability Studies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Master's degree with 55% marks in the relevant discipline, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The entry pay for the Assistant Professor position is Rs. 57700/- in Academic Pay Level 10 as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official TISS website.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates with a Ph.D. from a foreign university apply?
faq.answer: Yes, a Ph.D. obtained from a foreign university ranked among the top 500 in the World University Ranking (QS, THE, or ARWU) is also accepted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions at TISS will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Does TISS offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not mention any specific age relaxation details. Candidates should consult the official notification for such information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
